parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_meetings (
  meeting_id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  idempotency_key TEXT UNIQUE,
  correlation_id TEXT,
  source TEXT,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  objective TEXT,
  context_summary TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'scheduled',
  priority TEXT,
  requested_for TIMESTAMPTZ,
  scheduled_for TIMESTAMPTZ,
  duration_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 30,
  timezone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'America/Guayaquil',
  scheduling_status TEXT,
  scheduling_notes TEXT,
  requested_by TEXT,
  calendar_provider TEXT,
  calendar_event_id TEXT,
  calendar_url TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS idempotency_key TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS correlation_id TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS objective TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS context_summary TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requested_for TIMESTAMPTZ;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duration_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 30;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timezone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'America/Guayaquil';
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_status TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_notes TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_provider TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_event_id TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_url TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW();
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requested_for TIMESTAMPTZ;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS timezone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'America/Guayaquil';
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_status TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS scheduling_notes TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_provider TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS calendar_url TEXT;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meetings ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW();
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_meeting_invitees (
  invitee_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  meeting_id UUID REFERENCES pmo_meetings(meeting_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  role TEXT,
  reason TEXT,
  email TEXT,
  discord_id TEXT,
  is_client BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  attendance_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'invited',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(meeting_id, name)
);

ALTER TABLE pmo_meeting_invitees ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_client BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
ALTER TABLE pmo_meeting_invitees ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS attendance_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'invited';
ALTER TABLE pmo_meeting_invitees ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS is_client BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_meeting_logs (
  log_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  meeting_id UUID REFERENCES pmo_meetings(meeting_id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  correlation_id TEXT,
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  actor TEXT,
  details JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_meeting_reminders (
  reminder_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  meeting_id UUID REFERENCES pmo_meetings(meeting_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  reminder_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  scheduled_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  payload JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  queued_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  last_error TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(meeting_id, reminder_type)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pmo_calendar_members (
  member_key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  display_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  role TEXT,
  timezone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'America/Guayaquil',
  is_client BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  working_hours JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{"days":[1,2,3,4,5],"windows":[["09:00","12:00"],["14:00","17:30"]]}'::jsonb,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events_outbox (
  outbox_id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  event_id TEXT,
  target TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'discord',
  action TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'notify',
  idempotency_key TEXT,
  payload JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  retry_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  scheduled_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  last_error TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS events_outbox_idempotency_key_uq ON events_outbox (idempotency_key);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pmo_meetings_status_date ON pmo_meetings (status, scheduled_for);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pmo_invitees_name ON pmo_meeting_invitees (lower(name));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pmo_reminders_due ON pmo_meeting_reminders (status, scheduled_at);
WITH member_seed AS (
  INSERT INTO pmo_calendar_members (member_key, display_name, role, is_client)
  SELECT lower(x.name), x.name, x.role, x.is_client
  FROM jsonb_to_recordset($12::jsonb) AS x(name text, role text, reason text, email text, discord_id text, is_client boolean)
  ON CONFLICT (member_key) DO UPDATE SET display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name, role = EXCLUDED.role, is_client = EXCLUDED.is_client, updated_at = NOW()
), params AS (
  SELECT
    $1::text AS idempotency_key,
    $2::text AS correlation_id,
    $3::text AS source,
    $4::text AS title,
    $5::text AS objective,
    $6::text AS context_summary,
    $7::text AS priority,
    $8::timestamptz AS requested_for,
    GREATEST(15, LEAST(120, $9::int)) AS duration_minutes,
    $10::text AS requested_by,
    $11::text AS timezone,
    $12::jsonb AS invitees,
    $13::jsonb AS scheduling_policy
), invitee_source AS (
  SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT invitees FROM params)) AS x(name text, role text, reason text, email text, discord_id text, is_client boolean)
), candidates AS (
  SELECT gs AS slot_start, gs + ((SELECT duration_minutes FROM params) || ' minutes')::interval AS slot_end
  FROM params p,
  generate_series(GREATEST(p.requested_for, NOW() + INTERVAL '15 minutes'), NOW() + INTERVAL '21 days', INTERVAL '30 minutes') AS gs
), valid_candidates AS (
  SELECT c.*
  FROM candidates c
  WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM (c.slot_start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil')) BETWEEN 1 AND 5
    AND (
      (((c.slot_start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil')::time >= TIME '09:00') AND ((c.slot_end AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil')::time <= TIME '12:00'))
      OR (((c.slot_start AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil')::time >= TIME '14:00') AND ((c.slot_end AT TIME ZONE 'America/Guayaquil')::time <= TIME '17:30'))
    )
), candidate_conflicts AS (
  SELECT
    v.slot_start,
    v.slot_end,
    COALESCE((
      SELECT jsonb_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('meeting_id', m.meeting_id, 'title', m.title, 'scheduled_for', m.scheduled_for, 'invitee', i.name))
      FROM pmo_meetings m
      JOIN pmo_meeting_invitees i ON i.meeting_id = m.meeting_id
      WHERE m.status IN ('proposed','scheduled','confirmed')
        AND lower(i.name) IN (SELECT lower(name) FROM invitee_source)
        AND m.scheduled_for IS NOT NULL
        AND m.scheduled_for < v.slot_end
        AND (m.scheduled_for + (m.duration_minutes || ' minutes')::interval) > v.slot_start
    ), '[]'::jsonb) AS conflicts
  FROM valid_candidates v
), free_slot AS (
  SELECT *, jsonb_array_length(conflicts) AS conflict_count
  FROM candidate_conflicts
  WHERE jsonb_array_length(conflicts) = 0
  ORDER BY slot_start ASC
  LIMIT 1
), selected_slot AS (
  SELECT slot_start, slot_end, conflict_count, conflicts FROM free_slot
  UNION ALL
  SELECT NULL::timestamptz, NULL::timestamptz, 0, '[]'::jsonb
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM free_slot)
), meeting AS (
  INSERT INTO pmo_meetings (idempotency_key, correlation_id, source, title, objective, context_summary, status, priority, requested_for, scheduled_for, duration_minutes, timezone, scheduling_status, scheduling_notes, requested_by, calendar_provider, calendar_url)
  SELECT
    p.idempotency_key, p.correlation_id, p.source, p.title, p.objective, p.context_summary,
    CASE WHEN s.slot_start IS NULL THEN 'needs_reschedule' ELSE 'scheduled' END,
    p.priority, p.requested_for, s.slot_start, p.duration_minutes, p.timezone,
    CASE
      WHEN s.slot_start IS NULL THEN 'no_available_slot'
      WHEN s.slot_start <> p.requested_for THEN 'auto_rescheduled'
      ELSE 'scheduled_as_requested'
    END,
    CASE
      WHEN s.slot_start IS NULL THEN 'No se encontro slot libre dentro de 21 dias.'
      WHEN s.slot_start <> p.requested_for THEN 'Se ajusto automaticamente por horario prudente o conflicto de invitados.'
      ELSE 'Horario solicitado disponible.'
    END,
    p.requested_by,
    'pmo_internal',
    '/webhook/pm-calendar?focus=' || p.idempotency_key
  FROM params p CROSS JOIN selected_slot s
  ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET
    objective = EXCLUDED.objective,
    context_summary = EXCLUDED.context_summary,
    priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
    requested_for = EXCLUDED.requested_for,
    scheduled_for = EXCLUDED.scheduled_for,
    duration_minutes = EXCLUDED.duration_minutes,
    timezone = EXCLUDED.timezone,
    scheduling_status = EXCLUDED.scheduling_status,
    scheduling_notes = EXCLUDED.scheduling_notes,
    status = EXCLUDED.status,
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING *
), inserted_invitees AS (
  INSERT INTO pmo_meeting_invitees (meeting_id, name, role, reason, email, discord_id, is_client, attendance_status)
  SELECT meeting.meeting_id, invitee_source.name, invitee_source.role, invitee_source.reason, invitee_source.email, invitee_source.discord_id, COALESCE(invitee_source.is_client, false), 'invited'
  FROM meeting, invitee_source
  ON CONFLICT (meeting_id, name) DO UPDATE SET reason = EXCLUDED.reason, role = EXCLUDED.role, is_client = EXCLUDED.is_client, attendance_status = 'invited'
  RETURNING 1
), reminder_seed AS (
  INSERT INTO pmo_meeting_reminders (meeting_id, reminder_type, scheduled_at, payload)
  SELECT meeting.meeting_id, r.reminder_type, r.scheduled_at, jsonb_build_object('meeting_id', meeting.meeting_id, 'title', meeting.title, 'scheduled_for', meeting.scheduled_for, 'reminder_type', r.reminder_type)
  FROM meeting
  CROSS JOIN LATERAL (VALUES
    ('24h', meeting.scheduled_for - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
    ('30m', meeting.scheduled_for - INTERVAL '30 minutes')
  ) AS r(reminder_type, scheduled_at)
  WHERE meeting.scheduled_for IS NOT NULL AND r.scheduled_at > NOW()
  ON CONFLICT (meeting_id, reminder_type) DO UPDATE SET scheduled_at = EXCLUDED.scheduled_at, status = 'pending', payload = EXCLUDED.payload
), log_row AS (
  INSERT INTO pmo_meeting_logs (meeting_id, correlation_id, action, actor, details)
  SELECT meeting_id, correlation_id, 'meeting_scheduled', requested_by, jsonb_build_object('requested_for', requested_for, 'scheduled_for', scheduled_for, 'duration_minutes', duration_minutes, 'scheduling_status', scheduling_status, 'invitees', (SELECT invitees FROM params), 'policy', (SELECT scheduling_policy FROM params))
  FROM meeting
)
SELECT
  meeting.meeting_id,
  meeting.idempotency_key,
  meeting.correlation_id,
  meeting.title,
  meeting.objective,
  meeting.status,
  meeting.priority,
  meeting.requested_for,
  meeting.scheduled_for,
  meeting.duration_minutes,
  meeting.timezone,
  meeting.scheduling_status,
  meeting.scheduling_notes,
  meeting.requested_by,
  meeting.calendar_url,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pmo_meeting_invitees i WHERE i.meeting_id = meeting.meeting_id) AS invitee_count,
  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(i) FROM (SELECT name, role, reason, is_client FROM pmo_meeting_invitees WHERE meeting_id = meeting.meeting_id ORDER BY is_client DESC, name) i), '[]'::json) AS invitees
FROM meeting;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, meeting_id: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.meeting_id, status: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.status, title: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.title, invitees: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.invitee_count, requested_for: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.requested_for, scheduled_for: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.scheduled_for, duration_minutes: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.duration_minutes, scheduling_status: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.scheduling_status, scheduling_notes: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.scheduling_notes, calendar_url: $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json.calendar_url }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const m = $('Build Meeting Notification').item.json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, meeting_id: m.meeting_id, status: m.status, title: m.title, invitees: m.invitee_count, requested_for: m.requested_for, scheduled_for: m.scheduled_for, duration_minutes: m.duration_minutes, scheduling_status: m.scheduling_status, scheduling_notes: m.scheduling_notes, calendar_url: m.calendar_url } }];
